items.title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
items.summary: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.

items.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
items.summary: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
items.summary: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

items.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
items.summary: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

items.title: New housing law targets affordability — what it means for homebuyers and sellers
items.summary: While the legislation is aimed at least partly at addressing affordability, experts say the benefits of the measure will take time to show up in the market.

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
items.summary: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.

items.title: A tiny GLP-1 implant is the latest bet to help patients maintain their weight loss
items.summary: Vivani Medical is developing an implant of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo Nordisk's obesity injection Wegovy and diabetes counterpart Ozempic.

items.title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
items.summary: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.

items.title: The best states to live in for 2026: No. 1 has a six-year winning streak
items.summary: Return to office mandates and a decline in remote work have companies looking more closely at the quality of life in the place where they establish offices.

items.title: These are America’s 10 worst states to live in for 2026
items.summary: Some states may have low costs and light regulation, but high crime and lack of healthcare are among important factors when people choose where to live.

items.title: Trump Accounts: Who is eligible, how $1,000 deposits work and how to open one
items.summary: Trump Accounts officially launched in July, introducing a new tax-deferred investing option for children. Here are the key features.

items.title: While Musk's Neuralink drills into skulls, China's BrainCo bets the future of brain tech is wearable
items.summary: Interest in brain-computer interfaces is rising as it promises to help people with compromised neural abilities.

items.title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill, which would become law automatically
items.summary: Congress passed the housing bill in June with strong bipartisan support amid concerns of rising home prices and institutional investors affecting the market.

items.title: From booksmaxxing to looksmaxxing: Why the viral trends concern some mental health experts
items.summary: People are self-optimizing everything — protein, skincare, fitness — to such a degree that "maxxing" is one of social media's most popular suffixes.

items.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
items.summary: SK Hynix has soared to a trillion-dollar market cap by serving some of the biggest names in technology, including Nvidia and Apple.

items.title: OpenAI power consolidates under co-founder Greg Brockman ahead of prospective IPO
items.summary: With Fidji Simo's official departure from OpenAI due to a chronic medical issue, Greg Brockman's role has become clearer.

items.title: How Apple stock rode the AI rollercoaster to record highs in 1 chart
items.summary: Apple stayed true to itself in the AI race, and Wall Street is finally rewarding the stock for it.

items.title: The AI race is shifting from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems
items.summary: Companies are starting to choose AI models by task, cost and control, not just leaderboard rank.

items.title: Trump admin eases export controls for UAE; Warren blasts 'corrupt' provision
items.summary: The Commerce Department will favorably review exports involving MGX, which used a stablecoin linked to President Trump's family for a $2B Binance investment.

items.title: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 5%
items.summary: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.

items.title: Traders fall back in love with Meta. Here's where bulls see it going
items.summary: Meta Platform's AI efforts are looking like the recipe for a comeback after an almost year-long drought in shares of the $1.7 trillion market-cap company.

items.title: Senate Democrats want hearings on Trump’s crypto holdings and foreign investors
items.summary: Democratic Senators cited $1.4 billion in Trump family crypto income, unidentified investors and a reported UAE-backed stake in World Liberty Financial.

items.title: Trump purges Election Assistance Commission members, months before midterms
items.summary: The White House said the Supreme Court's ruling allowing President Trump to fire FTC Commissioner Louise Slaughter provided the precedent for the removals.

items.title: The ETF market is pushing the limits of the leverage it can handle. SK Hynix is the latest example
items.summary: The original ETF boom was about low cost, tax-efficient core index funds. Now single-stock ETFs are upping risk, with leverage getting 'a little carried away.'

items.title: As bank earnings approach, a market anomaly emerges
items.summary: The Financial Select Sector Index trades at roughly 15.5 times forward earnings — about a turn and a quarter cheaper than where it stood in 2024.

items.title: Trump Accounts may help foster children build a financial safety net. What to know
items.summary: Advocates say that Trump Accounts for foster children may end up being helpful, as long as concerns about flexibility and accessibility are addressed.

items.title: Air taxi company Beta wraps first test flights in U.S. government's pilot program
items.summary: Beta is one of several electric air taxi makers racing to secure Federal Aviation Administration certification and start flying passengers commercially.

items.title: How the U.S.-Iran deal set the stage for renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The U.S. and Iran's contradictory interperations of the memorandum of understanding have led to renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Meta's stock has best week since early 2024 as optimism builds around AI strategy
items.summary: Meta released two AI models this week as part of its new Muse Spark family, under the leadership of Alexandr Wang.

items.title: Kraken is rebuilding its app around agentic trading as crypto exchanges evolve beyond crypto
items.summary: Kraken is rebuilding its app around agentic trading, the company told CNBC exclusively.
